query:
UPDATE orders 
SET deliveryCity = '上海'
WHERE (deliveryCity LIKE '%腾讯%' OR deliveryRoom LIKE '%腾讯%')
  AND (deliveryCity IS NULL OR deliveryCity = '' OR deliveryCity = '未知城市' OR deliveryCity LIKE '%腾讯%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute UPDATE orders 
SET deliveryCity = '上海'
WHERE (deliveryCity LIKE '%腾讯%' OR deliveryRoom LIKE '%腾讯%')
  AND (deliveryCity IS NULL OR deliveryCity = '' OR deliveryCity = '未知城市' OR deliveryCity LIKE '%腾讯%');
